nodes.label: Dusk browser tests disabled note (issue #43)
nodes.rationale: Dusk-tests job disabled because Dusk + Inertia/React is too fragile for reliable CI; browser tests need to be rewritten in Playwright (see issue #43).

nodes.label: GSAP animation templates (blockTilt, spiral, stackFlip, arc)
nodes.norm_label: gsap animation templates (blocktilt, spiral, stackflip, arc)

nodes.label: README Stack table (PHP/Laravel, React/TS/Vite, Inertia, GSAP, SQLite)
nodes.norm_label: readme stack table (php/laravel, react/ts/vite, inertia, gsap, sqlite)

nodes.label: useFeedQueue go_back navigation bug fix
nodes.rationale: back->forward navigation was dropping posts because go_back reducer failed to prepend the departing post back into the queue; fixed to restore correctly.

nodes.label: App Branding Fix (APP_NAME=Bloom via Docker ARG)
nodes.rationale: Titles showed ' - Laravel' because APP_NAME=Laravel in .env leaked via VITE_APP_NAME; fixed with Docker ARG APP_NAME=Bloom and VITE_APP_NAME injection at build; found ci.yml lowercase bug producing '— bloom' instead of '— Bloom'.
nodes.norm_label: app branding fix (app_name=bloom via docker arg)

nodes.label: Spec: Home Icon & Feed Transport Design (2026-06-24)
nodes.norm_label: spec: home icon & feed transport design (2026-06-24)

nodes.label: Bluesky/Mastodon avatar resolution (getProfiles batch, federated lookup w/ 24h cache)
nodes.rationale: Bluesky avatars resolved via batch getProfiles call; Mastodon avatars via federated lookup cached 24h to reduce cross-instance lookup cost.
nodes.norm_label: bluesky/mastodon avatar resolution (getprofiles batch, federated lookup w/ 24h cache)

nodes.label: PostNormalizer Mastodon bare-username mention detection fix
nodes.rationale: Fixed Mastodon mention detection to match bare usernames; moved chip rendering into feed.tsx attribution bar and added dedup.
nodes.norm_label: postnormalizer mastodon bare-username mention detection fix

nodes.label: ESLint v10 actual upgrade (eslint@10, @eslint/js@10, eslint-plugin-react-hooks@7.1.1)
nodes.rationale: Agent review found the earlier PR #154 claimed v10 but was plugin-only migration on eslint ^9; user directed a true v10 upgrade of eslint, @eslint/js, and eslint-plugin-react-hooks.

nodes.label: SSRF Review: ConnectionsController::validateInstanceUrl
nodes.rationale: validateInstanceUrl enforces HTTPS, blocks private IPs, and checks hostnames to prevent SSRF via user-supplied Mastodon instance URLs.

nodes.label: Matomo token_auth security fix (GET->POST)
nodes.rationale: token_auth was sent as GET query string, risking credential exposure in logs/Referer headers; moved to POST form body.

nodes.label: CW Blur / Author-level Content Warning Overlay
nodes.norm_label: cw blur / author-level content warning overlay

nodes.label: showCwOverlayRef useLayoutEffect race condition fix
nodes.rationale: Race condition in showCwOverlayRef during useLayoutEffect fixed alongside a revealCw double-click guard to prevent duplicate reveal state toggles.

nodes.label: Algo Feed Buffer Starvation Fix
nodes.rationale: v1 scaled buffer with hardcoded 40 -> max(config_buffer, accounts x per_provider_limit); v2 removed the formula entirely, defaulting buffer_size=200 to prevent silent post drops.

nodes.label: PR #176 (hardening: null guards, byte bounds, HTTP logging)
nodes.norm_label: pr #176 (hardening: null guards, byte bounds, http logging)

nodes.label: Post-level CW auto-advance bug fix
nodes.rationale: Post-level CW paused auto-advance when it should have matched author-level CW behavior; fixed by removing onReady suppression in PostContent.tsx.

nodes.label: DocsController slug regex XSS/path-traversal hardening
nodes.rationale: Slug regex ^[a-z0-9-]+$ blocks path traversal; CommonMark strips HTML and blocks unsafe links, preventing XSS from markdown docs content.
